metadata.description: Marketplace metadata for companion planning, workflow, SDD, and clean-code enforcement plugins.

plugins.name: workflow-orchestration
plugins.description: Idea-to-done conductor, planning, delivery orchestration, codebase mapping, architecture review, brainstorm ideation, implementation, systematic debugging, incident RCA, e2e test generation, review-resolution, PR-readiness, diff review, git worktree lifecycle, swarm orchestration, contract generation, PR publication, release orchestration, knowledge capture, and knowledge refresh skills.

plugins.name: sdd-workflow
plugins.description: Spec-driven development workflow plugin for GitHub Copilot CLI.

plugins.name: clean-code-codex
plugins.description: Composable, multi-language, TDD-first clean code enforcement system. Orchestrates 17 check sub-skills across TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, and Rust.
